title: How one early hour changes everything
caption:
The hour before 8 AM is the most honest hour of the day.

No audience. No performance. Just you and what you actually do when no one's watching.

Most men give it to the phone. The ones building something give it to God — and to the work that follows from that.

Try it for five days. One page before one notification. Body moved before your day moves you. You won't get it perfect. That's not the point.

#faith #discipline #earlymorning #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #habitformation #morningroutine
